patterns.label: Meeting Notes & Action Item Capture
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 11 +11 (Loop notes incremental update +5, discussion-to-Loop workflow +3, post-meeting recap broadcast +3). 228 total, 39.95 hrs. DECLINING (-35% vs prior +17). Trend reversal after sustained RISING — redistribution to transcript-to-loop-ppt-pipeline downstream. Chain head integrity maintained; 3 downstream workflows still active.

patterns.label: Azure DevOps Notification Triage
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 11 confirmed +30 (ADO email notifications: Task/Bug/Requirement/Epic — skim/triage, freq=30, 45min). 558 total, 20.84 hrs across 19 unbroken cycles. STABLE. DEEP SATURATION past 550. Decomposition into 5 workstream sub-classifiers remains overdue 7 cycles. Highest automation score in catalog (95).

patterns.label: Agent Eval Setup, Analysis & Standardized Reporting

STABLE. EvalCon April 2nd deadline now 14 days out — peak demand window sustained. Highest value score in catalog (95).

patterns.label: Calendar Overload & Meeting Invite Triage
patterns.llmRationale: Cycle 11 confirmed +26 (6 1:1s/225min, 8 external meetings/460min, Camp AIR standups/120min, Learning Fridays/175min, Friday Show/55min, CAPE Architecture/55min, 6 other anchors/160min — 20.83hr week). 417 total, 278.14 hrs. STABLE. Highest cumulative time in catalog. EII=31% (Accenture, Avanade, Cognizant, KPMG, IBM). MPBI=11 for 2nd consecutive cycle.

DECLINING 3rd consecutive cycle (-55% vs prior +11). automationScore dropped 80→78. REDISTRIBUTED diagnosis strengthened — sub-signals fully absorbed into skill-library-socialization and transcript-to-loop-ppt-pipeline.

DECLINING 3rd consecutive cycle (-60% vs prior +5). automationScore dropped 77→74. Eval tooling and scoping fully routed to eval-coaching-and-scoping. Monitor for potential retirement review at 4th consecutive decline.

patterns.label: Training / Hackathon / Immersion Event Artifact Coordination

STABLE. 18-event-per-week cadence now baseline. proactive trigger: fire 24h before each confirmed recurring slot.

RISING (+38% vs prior +8). External partner surge 2nd consecutive cycle. automationScore raised 71→72.

spawnRegistry.description: Tracks parent→child pattern lineage. When a parent pattern sheds a sub-signal into a new pattern, both are recorded here.

spawns.reason: GitHub artifact sharing sub-signal matured into independent socialization pattern
Customer-facing enablement layer distinct from eval schema/framework scaffolding
Signal-to-synthesis-to-artifact loop distinct from routing/dedup decisions
Eval-specific scoping questions separated from general platform Q&A
Loop/PPT pipeline sub-workflow matured into standalone pattern

candidateSkills.name: meeting-notes-action-extractor
candidateSkills.description: Ingests meeting transcript, agenda, or Loop doc and emits structured action items with owner/due-date, decisions log, follow-up email draft, and ADO task stubs. Resolves Loop doc re-use pattern — same doc updated incrementally per recurring meeting. 228 occurrences across 19 unbroken cycles. Chain head for transcript-to-loop and post-meeting-external-followup downstream.
triggerExamples: Extract action items from today's Camp AIR standup and update the Loop doc
Summarize external customer meeting with Accenture into Loop page with owners
Create standardized 1:1 notes template for all 6 weekly 1:1 meetings
Generate post-meeting recap broadcast from CAPE Architecture Call
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Replaces ~39.95 hrs across 4 roles. 228 occ over 19 cycles. Chain head for 2 downstream patterns. Est. ~$103,870/yr.

candidateSkills.name: ado-notification-router
candidateSkills.description: Classifies ADO notification emails by work-item type, workstream prefix, and urgency. Routes action-required to correct role; auto-archives FYI. DEEP SATURATION at 558 occ. Decompose into 5 sub-classifiers overdue 7 cycles. Highest automation score in catalog (95).
triggerExamples: Triage my ADO inbox — what needs action vs FYI?
Classify ADO notifications by workstream: IcM vs coverage vs AI Eval
Which Bug/Requirement notifications require PM response before EOD?
Route this Task notification to the correct DRI based on workstream prefix
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Eliminates ~20.84 hrs. 558 occ SATURATED at 30/week. Highest automation (95). Est. ~$54,184/yr.

candidateSkills.name: eval-report-synthesizer
candidateSkills.description: Ingests eval results, CAPE leadership threads, customer donated evals playbook, EvalCon proposals, and customer sync notes. Produces standardized reports. EvalCon April 2nd deadline active — peak demand window. 291 occurrences, 5 participants. Highest value score in catalog (95).
triggerExamples: Synthesize eval progress from CAPE leadership threads and customer donated evals discussion
Prepare EvalCon content submission from Teams threads and strategy discussions
Generate customer donated evals playbook summary for field distribution
Create eval strategy overview for field enablement
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Saves ~74.39 hrs across 5 roles. Highest value (95). EvalCon deadline peak demand. Est. ~$193,414/yr.

candidateSkills.name: eval-template-scaffolder
candidateSkills.description: Generates structured eval frameworks, coverage models, and test-case scaffolds from agent description and engagement context. Agent Eval Sets_Template.xlsx reshared repeatedly across engagements. Note: DECLINING trend — customer presentation layer now tracked separately under customer-enablement-pack-generator.
triggerExamples: Scaffold eval set for a new Copilot Studio agent — 3 intents, 2 tools
Generate eval coverage model for orchestration agent with multiple tools
Create pass/fail threshold matrix for customer eval review
Template eval set structure for Duracell/Lumen/E.ON engagement
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Saves ~39.46 hrs across 4 roles. 141 occ. DECLINING — prioritize before further decomposition. Est. ~$102,596/yr.

candidateSkills.name: weekly-status-report-generator
candidateSkills.description: Generates standardized weekly status reports from Loop docs, Teams threads, email, meeting notes. Resolves 5-format parallel creation gap (Weekly Status, Evals Update, Turbo Train, XFN Report Out, EOD Debrief). Includes dashboard.html cycle output. RISING trend — growing demand.
triggerExamples: Generate this week's CAPE eval status merging all sources
Refresh Skilluminator dashboard.html for Cycle 11 output
Draft unified XFN Report Out from parallel Teams posts this week
Create EOD debrief template for Camp AIR daily follow-up
candidateSkills.valueProposition: Saves ~30.14 hrs across 4 roles. 93 occ RISING. 5 parallel formats. Est. ~$78,364/yr.
